visa_types.name: Relative's Visa
visa_types.processing_time:
Applicants who have submitted their application at the South Africa Visa application centre in Mongolia can collect the passport from the application centre after 45-60 days starting from the day after the date of submission. The processing time is counted from the date when the Embassy of South Africa in Beijing receives the application documents; it will not include the application delivery time between the Visa Application Centre and Embassy. Please be informed that the processing time may vary depending on individual circumstances. The collection timing is 9:00 - 17:00 (Monday-Friday except weekends & holidays mentioned in the holidays list).
To collect the passport, please bring the original  acknowledgement receipt and any original Government Photo ID proof.

## Photo Specifications
Photograph  Specifications For Visas 

                                                                          Photograph specifications for visas, permits etc
Photographs must be: 
- 35mm in width and       45mm in length
- A close-up of your       head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 – 80% of the       photograph Of high quality with no ink marks, lines or creases and not       damaged
- Taken against a       white background
The photograph must: 
- Show you looking       directly at the camera
- Have appropriate       brightness and contrast
Head coverings are not permitted, except for  religious reasons, but your facial features must be clearly shown. 
  Spectacles may be worn provided that the lenses do  not make the eyes invisible.

[Table:  Holiday ]

## Processing Time
Applicants who have submitted their application at the South Africa Visa application centre in Mongolia can collect the passport from the application centre after 45-60 days starting from the day after the date of submission. The processing time is counted from the date when the Embassy of South Africa in Beijing receives the application documents; it will not include the application delivery time between the Visa Application Centre and Embassy. Please be informed that the processing time may vary depending on individual circumstances. The collection timing is 9:00 - 17:00 (Monday-Friday except weekends & holidays mentioned in the holidays list).
To collect the passport, please bring the original  acknowledgement receipt and any original Government Photo ID proof.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category does not really require an offer of  employment. Critical skills or qualifications must be demonstrated by means of  publications, testimonials and/or motivations from academic institutions.  Should a foreigner meet these requirements, his/her immediate family members  will likewise qualify to apply for permanent residence status in the Republic.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category does not really require an offer of  employment. Critical skills or qualifications must be demonstrated by means of  publications, testimonials and/or motivations from academic institutions. visa_types.overview:
Overview
A permanent residence permit may be issued to a  foreigner of good and sound character that has received an offer for permanent  employment, provided that-
 Such foreigner has proven to the satisfaction of  the Director-General that the position exists and that the position and related  job description was advertised in the prescribed form and no suitably qualified  South African citizens or permanent resident was available to fill it.
 The yearly limit of available permanent residence  permits contemplated in section 27(a)(ii) of the Act shall be as determined  from time to time by the Minister, after consultation with the Ministers of  Trade and Industry, Labour, Basic Education and Higher Education and Training,  by notice in the Gazette.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A permanent residence permit may be issued to a  foreigner of good and sound character that has received an offer for permanent  employment, provided that-
 Such foreigner has proven to the satisfaction of  the Director-General that the position exists and that the position and related  job description was advertised in the prescribed form and no suitably qualified  South African citizens or permanent resident was available to fill it.
 The yearly limit of available permanent residence  permits contemplated in section 27(a)(ii) of the Act shall be as determined  from time to time by the Minister, after consultation with the Ministers of  Trade and Industry, Labour, Basic Education and Higher Education and Training,  by notice in the Gazette.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 A foreigner is a spouse of a South African citizen or permanent resident for five years and satisfies the Director-General that a good faith spousal relationship exists. Such permit shall lapse if at any time within two years from issuing of the permit, the good faith spousal relationship no longer subsists, save for case of death.
A foreigner who has been issued with a permanent residence permit in terms of section 26(b)shall, within the last six months of the second year following the issuing of that permit, avail himself or herself for an interview at any office of the Department.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 A foreigner is a spouse of a South African citizen or permanent resident for five years and satisfies the Director-General that a good faith spousal relationship exists. Such permit shall lapse if at any time within two years from issuing of the permit, the good faith spousal relationship no longer subsists, save for case of death.
A foreigner who has been issued with a permanent residence permit in terms of section 26(b)shall, within the last six months of the second year following the issuing of that permit, avail himself or herself for an interview at any office of the Department.
